configurePresets.name: debug
configurePresets.description: Debug build; optional deps (DUMPI/SWM/UNION/Torch/ZeroMQ) auto-detected. Requires ROSS: export ROSS_ROOT=<ross-install> (or set CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH / module load).

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Optimized build; optional deps auto-detected. Requires ROSS on ROSS_ROOT / CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH.

configurePresets.name: relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.description: Optimized build with debug symbols (profiling, optimized crash diagnosis).

configurePresets.name: coverage
configurePresets.description: Debug build with --coverage instrumentation; mirrors the CI coverage job (collect with lcov after ctest).

configurePresets.name: full-ci
configurePresets.description: All optional subsystems forced ON, with dep paths matching the ghcr.io/codes-org/codes-ci-full image (/opt/<dep>). Run inside that image; Torch is found via the Torch_DIR env var (export Torch_DIR=$(python3 -c 'import torch; print(torch.utils.cmake_prefix_path)')/Torch).

configurePresets.name: full-local-base
configurePresets.description: Heavy-deps flags + env-driven dep paths shared by full-local-debug/release. Export each var to the dep's install prefix: CODES_SWM_DIR, CODES_UNION_DIR, CODES_ARGOBOTS_DIR, CODES_DUMPI_DIR; Torch is found via Torch_DIR. Every CODES_USE_<dep> is ON, so a missing/wrong path fails configure with 'CODES_USE_<dep>=ON but <dep> could not be found/enabled.'

configurePresets.name: full-local-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Full (all heavy deps, local paths from env) - Debug
configurePresets.description: Heavy-deps Debug build with dep locations from environment variables (CODES_SWM_DIR, CODES_UNION_DIR, CODES_ARGOBOTS_DIR, CODES_DUMPI_DIR; Torch via Torch_DIR). Use when your heavy deps are not under /opt.

configurePresets.name: full-local-release
configurePresets.displayName: Full (all heavy deps, local paths from env) - Release
configurePresets.description: Heavy-deps Release build with dep locations from environment variables (CODES_SWM_DIR, CODES_UNION_DIR, CODES_ARGOBOTS_DIR, CODES_DUMPI_DIR; Torch via Torch_DIR). Use when your heavy deps are not under /opt.

buildPresets.name: full-local-debug
buildPresets.displayName: Full (all heavy deps, local paths from env) - Debug

buildPresets.name: full-local-release
buildPresets.displayName: Full (all heavy deps, local paths from env) - Release

testPresets.name: full-local-debug
testPresets.displayName: Full (all heavy deps, local paths from env) - Debug

testPresets.name: full-local-release
testPresets.displayName: Full (all heavy deps, local paths from env) - Release
